chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 282 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A 2. For hearing of main case 27.10.2025 Mr. Kashif Hussain Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Ms. Shabana Naheed, Assistant PG for the State along with ASI Muhammad Sachal Thaheem, PS Sarhad, SIP Ghulam Akbar of PS Daharki >>>>>..<<<<< Mr. Muhammad Tahir Panhwar, Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.6, which is taken on record. Learned AAG files statements along with certain documents on behalf of Respondents No.2, 3 and 4. All are taken on record. They submit that about 20 criminal cases have been registered against Petitioner No.2, namely Miandad Pitafi and he is notorious criminal and absconder. Under these circumstances, no protection can be provided to an absconder. The Petition is dismissed. Judge ARBROHI
